How TE Premium Works

You control the level of premium applied to tight end values. Curious which tier is right for your league/settings? Here are some general guidelines for the three Tight End Premium tiers:

Off

Start 1 TE. No scoring bonus for tight ends.

TE+

Start 1 TE. A mild/moderate scoring bonus for tight ends (a +.5PPR/.75PPR boost, or ~1.5–2x the PPR that WRs receive).

TE++

Start 2 TEs, OR an extreme scoring bonus for tight ends (a >1PPR boost or >2x WR PPR).

TE+++

Start 2 TEs, AND additional scoring bonus(es) for tight ends compared to WRs.

More questions? Learn more about KTC's TE Premium here.
